name_cn:
Top-tier replica exclusive photo 📷 M83271
The 'Portefeuille Victorine' reinterpreted in soft Monogram Unplant leather. The iconic Monogram pattern is subtly embossed. The envelope-style flap opens and closes with a button engraved with 'Louis Vuitton'. The interior includes a bill and coin pocket, as well as 6 card slots.
12 x 9.5 x 1.5 cm
